source_trace.p26e_finding: append_tsl_history() skipped snapshots when MNL odds unchanged, even during closing window

dedup_behavior_before.rule: Skip if MNL odds_key == dedup_state[match_id], regardless of capture context
dedup_behavior_before.problem: Closing snapshots blocked by stable odds; CLV pairs cannot form

dedup_behavior_after.rule_normal: Skip if MNL odds_key == dedup_state[match_id] AND force_closing=False (unchanged)
dedup_behavior_after.rule_closing: Always write when force_closing=True (closing window detected by scheduler)

force_closing_rule.pregame_unaffected: pregame=True alone does NOT set force_closing

note: Long-running daemon (PID 1715) reloads Python code on each IMPORT, but since force_closing is wired through the call chain, the next daemon tick will automatically use the new behavior. However, since the daemon caches modules, a restart is recommended to ensure fresh import.

expected_coverage_impact.future_games: All future WBC/NPB games in closing window will get force-saved closing snapshot
